directive.title: Loading skeletons for all dashboard pages

auditor.summary: The generated code provides a solid foundation for the skeleton loading system with 13 of 14 loading.tsx files, proper accessibility attributes, and CSS-only shimmer animations. However, there are critical issues: 2 missing loading.tsx files (forecasting, executive-summary), no modifications to app/globals.css or tailwind.config.ts as required, a duplicate TypeScript interface causing compilation errors, and a missing cn utility import. Additionally, test files were listed in the spec but not generated. The code structure and component composition are correct, but these issues prevent the build from passing. Score is 72 due to critical missing files and configuration changes needed.

top_issues.description: Missing file. The spec requires 14 loading.tsx files but only 13 were generated. Forecasting and executive-summary pages are missing.
No modification provided. The spec requires skeleton-animations.css to be imported exactly once at the global level via app/globals.css.
No modification provided. The spec requires adding 'skeleton' to safelist patterns and extending animation/keyframes with shimmer definition.
